nodes.label: Onboarding — Progress/Stats Slide 'Mide tu progreso, celebra cada paso'
nodes.description: Onboarding carousel slide (4th dot active out of 5) with dark background. Shows blurred/ghost preview of the app's Progress/Stats screen titled 'Tu Bprogreso' (likely 'Tu Progreso') with '3,600+' stat and a score card showing '847' with '+23%' indicator. Below the blurred app preview are ghost content cards including Steve Jobs Stanford speech, Respira y vuelve a ti, Atomic Habits cap 1, Foco profundo: o·o, and '12 días seguidos — 1 racha'. Headline text: 'Mide tu progreso, celebra cada paso.' in white with 'celebra cada paso' highlighted in teal italic. Subtitle: 'Visualiza cuánto has crecido y mantén tu racha viva.' Navigation arrow button (teal circle with '>') at bottom right. Pagination dots at bottom center.

nodes.label: Progress Screen Preview (ghosted) — score 847, streak 12 días
nodes.description: Ghosted/blurred preview of the Progress tab shown within onboarding slide. Shows: header 'Tu Progreso' with 3,600+ total metric. Main score card showing 847 with +23% badge (Mentex score or streak points). Content history cards: Steve Jobs Stanford, Respira y vuelve a ti, Atomic Habits cap 1, Foco profundo. Streak indicator '12 días seguidos — 1 racha'. Demonstrates social proof and gamification elements of the app.
